problem id: 1deaf759
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00111111 -> 01111001
  01111010 -> 11010011
  11011110 -> 11110110
  10010110 -> 10110100
  00000111 -> 00111000
  10100110 -> 00110101
  11001111 -> 01111110
  11010110 -> 10110110
  11111001 -> 01001111
  11111111 -> 01111111

query: 11110100
predicted answer: 10100111
